steps.title: Determine the target meaning
steps.content: The narrator says he did not “concern myself with” his sisters' dolls and giggling, expressing that he did not involve himself in or give attention to their activities. We need a word for: caring about, being occupied with, giving attention to something.

steps.title: Find the matching choice
steps.content:
The phrase needs to mean give attention to or be interested in, since the narrator says he "spoke very little" and kept to himself during breakfast. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Craft: to make or build something — the narrator is not making dolls; he is choosing not to pay attention to them. ✗
  • Choice B — Get angry about: feel anger toward — the narrator describes indifference, not emotional conflict or irritation with his sisters. ✗
  • Choice C — Care about: be interested in or give attention to — matches the narrator saying he did not involve himself with his sisters' play or giggling. ✓
  • Choice D — Earn: gain through work or effort — refers to financial or material gain, unrelated to paying attention to someone's activities. ✗
That matches Choice C — Care about.
